prompt: /explain-codebase explain logger.go and what calls it --scope file:logger.go

assertions.text: Frontmatter scope value is file:logger.go (or equivalent file scope)
Visited >= 5 files (BFS expanded outward from logger.go, not single-file-stop)
Identifies callers (e.g. exported.go, entry.go) in Files touched section
_session_state.json contains visited list with logger.go and at least 4 other files
